title: Evolution
puzzle: How can tiny changes over time produce the diversity of life?
insight: Evolution works when variation, inheritance, and selection interact across many generations, gradually shaping populations rather than instantly changing individuals.
key_ideas: Variation gives selection something to work with.
Traits spread when they improve survival or reproduction in a context.
Evolution does not aim ahead; it accumulates what works well enough.
mind_blower: The complexity of life can emerge without a planner when change compounds across deep time.
next_curiosity: If evolution depends on context, how do rapidly changing environments affect living systems?
narration_text: How can tiny changes over time produce the diversity of life? Evolution works when variation, inheritance, and selection interact across many generations, gradually shaping populations rather than instantly changing individuals. Variation gives selection something to work with. Traits spread when they improve survival or reproduction in a context. Evolution does not aim ahead; it accumulates what works well enough. The complexity of life can emerge without a planner when change compounds across deep time. If evolution depends on context, how do rapidly changing environments affect living systems?
